response: Stockholm, the capital city of Sweden, was founded in 1252 and is home to a population of 1.6 million people spread across an area of 188 square kilometers, with Swedish as the official language. The city boasts a strong economy with a GDP per capita of $62,000, making it one of the wealthiest cities in Europe. Stockholm experiences a wide range of temperatures throughout the year, with average temperatures dropping to -3°C in January and rising to a pleasant 18°C in July.
